MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: June Leathley. Arnold Walter Evje, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Kashmira Shah and there being no appearance by Defendant, David House, the matter is taken off settlement conference, request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
